1754810.name: 《深埋之星》原声大碟
1754810.description:
交流 X 生存 X 冒险《深埋之星（BURIED STARS）》数字原声大碟

由撰写了经典冒险游戏《黑房》系列和《灰色都市》系列的Sooylbae负责总监和剧本，与他合作多年的开发组在LINE Games再次联手，呈献了《深埋之星（BURIED STARS）》这一杰作。

收录的乐曲由从《黑房》系列开始合作的FunnyBugs的Mazorski参与，流畅地描写了神秘与惊悚、紧张与感动之间的复杂感情线。
在《深埋之星（BURIED STARS）》中全新参与的beggarprince也在留下苦涩的真相和余韵的花絮中带来了精彩配乐，在玩家心中掀起了长久的涟漪。

创作剧本的Sooylbae参与了主题曲《Be Honest》的作词，将贯穿《BURIED STARS》故事的主题融入到歌词当中。

本数字OST收录了游戏中《Be Honest》的多个版本和MR，可以再次感受到在游戏中体验到的喜怒哀乐和感动。

《Be Honest》歌词
You’re standing on the bright stage
But the darkness wrapped around you
The truth is stirring by your lies

Be honest
(You’re going darkness, going deeply)

There are no more secrets, anymore
Take off your fake face, Right Now
It’s not Torment for you
It’s you freedom back

Be honest

You don’t need to hide your mind
It’s hard to control the truth
Don’t put yourself in the showwindow
can’t hold on to yourself

Be honest
(You’re going darkness, going deeply)

There are no more secrets, anymore
Take off your fake face, Right Now
It’s not Torment for you
It’s you freedom back

Be honest
Be honest
Be honest
Be honest...
